nodes.label: P3.3 — the continual veto (closes Phase 3)
nodes.description: Tests whether contrast+coordination (SCFFContrastOLU, L=4, w=2) re-earns the Phase-1 continual win on the exp4/P2.6 class-incremental digits stream. Conditions: gd (catastrophic) / energy_sleep (P1/P2 baseline) / contrast_sleep (new recipe) / contrast_nosleep (rot control). 3 seeds.

nodes.label: P3.3 verdict: VETO PASSED (and IMPROVED) — Phase 3 ADOPTED and CLOSES
nodes.description: contrast+coord+sleep: final 0.954, BWT -0.017 [-0.020,-0.015] vs energy-SCFF+sleep 0.938 / -0.026 [-0.027,-0.022] (disjoint-IQR, 3/3 seeds better). Contrast SCFF-probe FLAT (0.938->0.936, doesn't forget). Sleep decisive (no-sleep rots to 0.214; GD-online 0.186/-0.992). The InfoNCE-bias-to-current-task worry did not materialize -- per-sample, no batch statistics, continual-safe by construction.

nodes.label: Decision: ADOPT the objective reframe; Phase 3 CLOSES; hands off to Phase 4
nodes.description: contrast+coordination is a strict upgrade over energy-goodness: composes depth (P3.2) AND preserves/improves continual win (P3.3), forward-only + per-sample. Only new cost = in-batch negatives (the LUT sampler). Hand-off: Phase 4 characterizes this cell before any further optimization.
